allow: Bash(apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3-pip 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda env list | grep hypir)
Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate hypir && accelerate env)
Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate hypir && python -c "import torch; print\('CUDA device count:', torch.cuda.device_count\(\)\)")
Bash(source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate hypir && accelerate launch train.py --config configs/sd2_train.yaml)
